svg.title: Telco Churn Prediction — ML System Architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end ML system showing data ingestion, training pipeline, serving layer, monitoring dashboard, and champion-challenger comparison

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me about the Telco Churn dataset')
sendPrompt('What does data_loader.py do in the churn project?')
g.text: Validate · fill nulls · drop dupes · engineer 16 features

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Why is there a calibration split in addition to train and test?')
sendPrompt('What is the calibration set used for in the churn pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What is the test set used for in the churn project?')
sendPrompt('Why is SMOTENC used instead of regular SMOTE?')
sendPrompt('What are the two preprocessors in the churn pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does SelectKBest feature selection work in the churn pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does Logistic Regression compare to other models in the churn pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What is SGD classifier used for?')
sendPrompt('How does the Decision Tree model compare?')
sendPrompt('Why was AdaBoost selected as first champion?')
sendPrompt('How do XGBoost and LightGBM compare in this pipeline?')
sendPrompt('Why did CatBoost win the challenger comparison?')
sendPrompt('What MLP architecture was used?')
sendPrompt('What is the generalization filter gap check?')
sendPrompt('What is isotonic probability calibration?')
sendPrompt('How is the decision threshold tuned to achieve recall >= 0.75?')
sendPrompt('Explain the 4-gate champion-challenger system in the churn project')
g.text: F1 +0.005 · ROC-AUC ≥ 0.80 · Recall ≥ 0.70 · Gap ≤ 10% → CatBoost promoted F1 0.619→0.634

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the model registry work in the churn system?')
sendPrompt('How does the FastAPI endpoint work for churn prediction?')
sendPrompt('Explain the 3-tier intervention engine — RETAIN, OUTREACH, URGENT')
sendPrompt('What does the Streamlit monitoring dashboard show?')
sendPrompt('How does PSI drift monitoring work in the churn system?')
